name: Multiple independent issues in one diff — a single pass must find them all
description: Exhaustive single-pass recall guard (spec 010, US5): one diff introduces three independent, genuine problems — a hardcoded secret, a bare except that swallows errors, and an unsanitized SQL string. A disciplined review must surface all three in one pass (not stop after the first), so a later review has nothing 'new' to add. Blocks (lgtm false) because real critical/warning issues are present.
diff:
--- a/service.py
+++ b/service.py
@@ -1,2 +1,18 @@
 import sqlite3
+
+API_KEY = "sk_live_abc123hardcodedsecret"
+
+def get_user(conn, user_id):
+    cur = conn.cursor()
+    cur.execute("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = '" + user_id + "'")
+    return cur.fetchone()
+
+def load_config(path):
+    try:
+        with open(path) as f:
+            return f.read()
+    except:
+        return None
